metadata.description: Batch 43 — additional Oxford 5000 words 1201-1300; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: covering or occurring throughout a country
words.definitionTh: ทั่วประเทศ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nationwide”.

words.definitionEn: relating to ships or a navy
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “naval”.

words.definitionEn: the process of finding and following a route
words.example: The robot uses vision-based navigation.

words.definitionEn: not far away
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nearby”.

words.definitionEn: something that is needed
words.definitionTh: ความจำเป็น
words.example: Traceability is a necessity for validation.

words.definitionEn: failure to give proper care or attention
words.example: Do not neglect preventive maintenance.

words.definitionEn: to discuss in order to reach agreement
words.example: Negotiate the technical scope with the supplier.

words.definitionEn: formal discussion aimed at agreement
words.example: Document the outcome of the negotiation.

words.definitionEn: located next to or near something
words.definitionTh: เพื่อนบ้าน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “neighboring”.

words.definitionEn: a structure made by birds or animals for shelter
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nest”.

words.definitionEn: remaining after deductions
words.example: Calculate the net production gain.

words.definitionEn: not supporting either side
words.example: Use a neutral background for inspection.

words.definitionEn: recently or not long ago
words.definitionTh: เมื่อเร็ว ๆ นี้
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “newly”.

words.definitionEn: a regular publication with organizational news
words.definitionTh: จดหมายข่าว
words.example: Publish the project update in the newsletter.

words.definitionEn: a specialized area serving a specific group
words.definitionTh: ตลาดเฉพาะกลุ่ม
words.example: The sensor serves a niche application.

words.definitionEn: a coin worth five cents
words.definitionTh: เหรียญห้าเซนต์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nickel”.

words.definitionEn: having high moral qualities
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “noble”.

words.definitionEn: to move the head slightly to show agreement
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nod”.

words.definitionEn: to formally propose someone for a role
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nominate”.

words.definitionEn: the act of formally proposing a candidate
words.definitionTh: การเสนอชื่อ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nomination”.

words.definitionEn: a person proposed for a role or award
words.definitionTh: ผู้ได้รับการเสนอชื่อ

words.definitionEn: despite what was just stated
words.definitionTh: อย่างไรก็ตาม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nonetheless”.

words.definitionEn: not operated primarily to make profit
words.definitionTh: ไม่แสวงหากำไร
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nonprofit”.

words.definitionEn: words or ideas with no sensible meaning
words.definitionTh: เรื่องไร้สาระ

words.definitionEn: twelve o’clock in the daytime
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “noon”.

words.definitionEn: an accepted standard of behavior
words.example: Compare the result with the process norm.

words.definitionEn: worthy of attention or important
words.example: The trial achieved a notable improvement.

words.definitionEn: in a way that deserves attention
words.definitionTh: อย่างโดดเด่น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “notably”.

words.definitionEn: a small book for writing notes
words.definitionTh: สมุดบันทึก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “notebook”.

words.definitionEn: to formally inform someone
words.definitionTh: แจ้งให้ทราบ
words.example: Notify maintenance when the alarm appears.

words.definitionEn: famous for something bad
words.definitionTh: มีชื่อเสีย

words.definitionEn: new and original
words.example: The team proposed a novel inspection method.

words.definitionEn: a person who writes novels
words.definitionTh: นักประพันธ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “novelist”.

words.definitionEn: at the present time
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nowadays”.

words.definitionEn: a place caring for young children or plants
words.definitionTh: สถานรับเลี้ยงเด็ก

words.definitionEn: relating to the care of patients
words.definitionTh: ทางการพยาบาล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “nursing”.

words.definitionEn: the process of obtaining and using food
words.example: The label includes nutrition information.

words.definitionEn: the condition of having excessive body fat
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “obesity”.

words.definitionEn: a reason for opposing something
words.definitionTh: ข้อคัดค้าน

words.definitionEn: to require or force someone to act

words.definitionEn: a person who watches and notices events
words.definitionTh: ผู้สังเกตการณ์

words.definitionEn: to think about something continuously
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “obsess”.

words.definitionEn: a persistent and excessive thought or interest
words.definitionTh: ความหมกมุ่น

words.definitionEn: something that blocks progress
words.example: Lighting variation is a major obstacle.

words.definitionEn: happening sometimes but not regularly
words.definitionTh: เป็นครั้งคราว

words.definitionEn: a job or regular activity
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “occupation”.

words.definitionEn: to fill, use, or control a place
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “occupy”.

words.definitionEn: an event that happens
words.definitionTh: การเกิดขึ้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “occurrence”.

words.definitionEn: the probability that something will happen
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “odds”.

words.definitionEn: a person who commits an offense
words.definitionTh: ผู้กระทำผิด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “offender”.

words.definitionEn: something offered for sale or consideration
words.definitionTh: สิ่งที่เสนอ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “offering”.

words.definitionEn: a person’s children or an animal’s young
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “offspring”.

words.definitionEn: continuing and not yet finished
words.definitionTh: กำลังดำเนินอยู่

words.definitionEn: in a direct and public way
words.definitionTh: อย่างเปิดเผย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “openly”.

words.definitionEn: a dramatic musical performance
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “opera”.

words.definitionEn: relating to the practical operation of a system
words.definitionTh: เชิงปฏิบัติการ

words.definitionEn: a person who operates equipment
words.definitionTh: ผู้ปฏิบัติงาน
words.example: The operator confirmed the reject result.

words.definitionEn: to choose one option
words.example: We opted for the higher-resolution camera.

words.definitionEn: relating to light or vision
words.example: Use an optical sensor at the entry point.

words.definitionEn: confidence that good results will occur
words.definitionTh: การมองโลกในแง่ดี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “optimism”.

words.definitionEn: expecting good outcomes
words.definitionTh: มองโลกในแง่ดี
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “optimistic”.

words.definitionEn: spoken rather than written
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “oral”.

words.definitionEn: a large group of musicians
words.definitionTh: วงออร์เคสตรา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “orchestra”.

words.definitionEn: produced without artificial chemicals; related to living matter
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “organic”.

words.definitionEn: relating to the structure of an organization
words.example: Define the organizational responsibilities.

words.definitionEn: an introduction or direction-setting process
words.definitionTh: การปฐมนิเทศ
words.example: Adjust the camera orientation.

words.definitionEn: to begin or come from a source
words.definitionTh: มีต้นกำเนิด

words.definitionEn: a sudden occurrence of disease or trouble
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “outbreak”.

words.definitionEn: a set of clothes or equipment
words.definitionTh: ชุดแต่งกาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “outfit”.

words.definitionEn: a short trip for pleasure
words.definitionTh: การออกนอกสถานที่
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “outing”.

words.definitionEn: a place or method for release or distribution
words.example: Check the air outlet for blockage.

words.definitionEn: a general attitude toward the future
words.definitionTh: แนวโน้ม / มุมมอง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “outlook”.

words.definitionEn: the amount produced by a system
words.example: Record the PLC output signal.

words.definitionEn: strong anger caused by something unfair
words.definitionTh: ความโกรธแค้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “outrage”.

words.definitionEn: a person not belonging to a group
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “outsider”.

words.definitionEn: exceptionally good or not yet completed
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “outstanding”.

words.definitionEn: to successfully deal with a problem
words.example: The new light helps overcome reflections.

words.definitionEn: to fail to notice or to have a view above
words.example: Do not overlook minor defect patterns.

words.definitionEn: to an excessive degree
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “overly”.

words.definitionEn: during one night or very quickly
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “overnight”.

words.definitionEn: to supervise and direct work
words.example: The project owner will oversee installation.

words.definitionEn: to reverse a decision or cause something to fall
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “overturn”.

words.definitionEn: to affect someone too strongly
words.example: Too many alarms can overwhelm operators.

words.definitionEn: very large or difficult to resist
words.definitionTh: มากมายท่วมท้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “overwhelming”.

words.definitionEn: the legal possession of something
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นเจ้าของ

words.definitionEn: a gas required for life and combustion
words.example: Measure the oxygen concentration.

words.definitionEn: a small container or bundle

words.definitionEn: a flat protective surface or cushion
words.example: Place a rubber pad under the camera mount.

words.definitionEn: the inner surface of the hand
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “palm”.

words.definitionEn: sudden uncontrollable fear
words.definitionTh: ความตื่นตระหนก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “panic”.

words.definitionEn: an organized public procession
words.definitionTh: ขบวนพาเหรด
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “parade”.

words.definitionEn: side by side and equally distant

words.definitionEn: a value defining how a system operates
words.definitionTh: พารามิเตอร์

words.definitionEn: relating to parents
words.definitionTh: ของผู้ปกครอง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “parental”.

words.definitionEn: a national lawmaking body
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “parliament”.

words.definitionEn: incomplete or affecting only part
words.example: The test produced only a partial result.

words.definitionEn: to a limited degree
words.definitionTh: เป็นบางส่วน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “partially”.

words.definitionEn: the act of taking part
words.definitionTh: การมีส่วนร่วม

words.definitionEn: a cooperative business relationship
words.example: The supplier partnership supports innovation.

words.definitionEn: working fewer than standard hours
words.example: A part-time technician supports the trial.
